stories.title: Build v2 infrastructure: storage abstraction, agent bus, and workflow graph generator
acceptance_criteria: store.py provides AbstractStore with LocalStore implementation and file-lock support
agent_bus.py produces JSONL events and Markdown discussion logs per wave
workflow_graph.py generates correct Mermaid and Graphviz output from task.json

stories.title: Build v2 core engine: async orchestrator and FastAPI backend
acceptance_criteria: zeus_orchestrator.py dispatches 3+ tasks concurrently within a wave without corrupting task.json
Orchestrator uses asyncio.Semaphore and isolated agent workspaces

stories.title: Deliver zero-build Web UI dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Web frontend (index.html) renders dashboard and graph without npm/build tools
Web UI consumes the same FastAPI backend

stories.title: Integrate, test, document, and validate backward compatibility
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests pass for end-to-end 2-wave execution with mock agents
zeus_runner.py --status on main remains unchanged and functional
v2 documentation (zeus-execute-v2.md) and README updates are complete

stories.title: Adaptive Wave Rescheduling — maximize concurrency slot utilization
acceptance_criteria: task.json schema supports original_wave, scheduled_wave, and rescheduled_from
zeus_orchestrator.py uses a priority queue and fills empty slots from future waves when current wave tasks block
Agent Bus emits task.rescheduled events for every dynamic move
Web UI correctly displays rescheduled tasks and updated wave progress
Tests confirm backward compatibility and state consistency under concurrent updates
